parameters.content: Connector template for draw.io::build_xml_artifact. Fill placeholder env vars before execution.

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{"service_name":"drawio","display_name":"draw.io","operation_id":"build_xml_artifact","method":"LOCAL","base_url":"{$env.DRAWIO_BASE_URL}","path":"drawio://artifact","url":"{$env.DRAWIO_BASE_URL}drawio://artifact","headers":{},"body":{},"query":{},"integration_mode":"artifact","status":"placeholder_only","credential_placeholders":["DRAWIO_BASE_URL"],"notes":"Generates and stores draw.io-compatible XML/CSV artifacts for later import."}}];
return [{json:{status:'placeholder_only', service:$json.service_name, operation:$json.operation_id, integration_mode:$json.integration_mode, body:$json.body, notes:$json.notes}}];
